title: The Default and Maximum # of Features a Vision Object Can Have
description:
The Default and Maximum # of Features a Vision Object Can Have

The Default and Maximum Number of Results

The default property configurations for a Blob object cause it to find only 1 feature within a Search Window

. This is because the NumberToFind property is set to 1. However, when you set the NumberToFind property (for the Blob or Correlation objects) to a number larger than 1, the vision object will attempt to find as many features as you specify.

Once the NumberToFind property is set, run your Blob object and you will see all the blobs which are found for this Blob object have an extrema

and position crosshair graphic displayed indicating where they were found. You can also see that the blob found which is considered the CurrentResult is highlighted in a lighter shade of green than the other blobs.
